final:
// // This comment suggests the counter decrements on each clock cycle and resets to one when the reset signal is high.
module counter_2bit (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg [1:0] count);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
	if (reset) begin
		count <= 2'b00;
	end else begin
		count <= count + 2'b01;
	end
end

endmodule
